title: basque-french molten tofu gratin
description: a french basque dish inspired by the flavors of southern france and northern spain, featuring marinated tofu in a sour cream and cheese bechamel sauce, perfect as a post-workout meal to replenish energy stores.
instructions: preheat your sous vide machine to 80°c
cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and place in a large bowl
whisk together the marinade ingredients and pour over the tofu
cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight
heat the vegan butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat
add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute
slowly pour in the soy milk and vegetable broth, whisking constantly
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes
remove from heat and stir in the nutritional yeast and dairy-free sour cream
transfer the tofu to a baking dish and spoon the bechamel sauce over the top
sprinkle the gruyère cheese over the bechamel sauce
place the baking dish under the broiler and cook until the cheese is melted and bubbly
